caption: The image is a four-panel collage featuring U.S. President Barack Obama and Vice President Joe Biden in various posed and candid moments together. It includes close-ups, side profiles, and a smiling interaction between the two men. A caption at the bottom reads, "I want someone to look at me the way Joe Biden looks at Obama."

The image shows a Twitter post from Rahul Gandhi dated December 1, 2017, featuring a photo of him and Barack Obama standing side by side. Both men are smiling, with Obama on the right wearing a dark suit and white shirt, and Gandhi on the left in a dark jacket over a collared shirt. The background includes framed artwork on a wall.

This image is a political meme featuring a split layout. The top section shows Osama bin Laden with text claiming Obama called the SEALs and they got him. The bottom section shows a smiling Barack Obama with text stating when the SEALs called Obama, they got denied.

The image shows a person with a painted clown face, featuring white base makeup, exaggerated red lips, and green eyeshadow, resembling a classic clown aesthetic. The individual has shoulder-length brown hair and is wearing a light-colored top. Overlaid text reads: "We're more Stupid than you give us Credit for. Good Morning, Sunday Morning!"

The image is a collage featuring multiple U.S. political figures with the bold text "WE ARE LEADERS" at the top and "OF THE PARTY OF HATE, DIVISION & DESTRUCTION" at the bottom. A caption below states, "This perfectly sums up the Democrat Party." The image includes a small overlay with the letters "RC" and the phrase "USA TRUMP," suggesting a political context.

The image features a group of children with red hair standing in front of several horses. Superimposed text reads, "Irish were the first slaves brought to America. Does that mean we get paid 'slave reparations' first?" The children are dressed in similar blue outfits and appear to be posing for the photo.

The image shows five men standing side by side, each wearing a brightly colored, patterned, matching two-piece outfit with a white belt. The central figure wears a blue outfit and a blue cap, with his arms crossed, while the others wear outfits in green, pink, purple, and yellow. The image is framed by text reading "FUTURE STAFFERS FOR" at the top and "THE 2020 DEMOCRATIC PARTY" at the bottom.

The image is a two-panel meme. The top panel shows a painting of King Louis XIV with the text “THE RISE OF ABSOLUTISM IN FRANCE” and his quote “L’état, c’est moi (I am the state).” The bottom panel features a photo of Joe Biden with the text “I AM THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY” and the date “-JOE BIDEN 9/29/2020.”

The image features a close-up of a woman with short dark hair and a serious expression, wearing a light-colored top and earrings. Superimposed text in bold, capitalized letters reads “THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP!” at the top and “FOR EXPOSING THE TRUE FACE OF THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY!” at the bottom. The background appears to be an outdoor setting with a light-colored building facade.

The image displays a Confederate flag as its background, overlaid with bold white text in all capital letters. The top text reads “THE DEMOCRAT PARTY,” and the bottom text reads “AMERICAS OLDEST HATE GROUP.” A watermark for “imgflip.com” is visible in the lower-left corner.

This black-and-white image features a man dressed as Elvis Presley wearing a headscarf and traditional Middle Eastern attire. Text at the top asks, “WHAT DO YOU CALL A MUSLIM ELVIS IMPERSONATOR?” with the answer “AMAL SHOOKUP” below it. At the bottom, there is a red prohibition symbol over a donkey and the text “BAN THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY.”

The image features a close-up of Joe Biden looking off to the side with a serious expression. Text overlays the image: “TBH” at the top and “WE COULD USE A BETTER NOMINEE” at the bottom. The photo appears to be taken indoors, possibly in an official setting.

The image features a central photo of a woman with an intense, yelling expression, her hand raised near her face. Surrounding this central image are smaller photos showing various people in different settings, mostly looking at a screen or device. At the top, text reads "THE FACE YOU MAKE," and at the bottom, "WHEN YOU'VE SPENT HALF YOUR LIFE BEING BRAINWASHED BY THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY" with a watermark for "Politifact.org" and a signature "~AmericaRepublic~."

The image features a digitally altered portrait of Abraham Lincoln wearing a red "Make America Great Again" cap and aviator sunglasses. Text at the top reads "IRONY...", and at the bottom, a caption states, "The party who freed the slaves and fought for civil rights is being called 'racist' by the party that owned the slaves and started the KKK."

The image is a two-panel meme featuring Kamala Harris in the top panel with the text “This President fuels division and anti-Semitism!” and Donald Trump with a young boy identified as his grandson Joseph in the bottom panel with the text “This President with his Jewish grandson Joseph.”

The image is a meme with a black background and white text. The top text reads "It's a Cult," followed by a framed photo of a large crowd at an event with the caption "The new Atheist / Communist Party" and "DEMOCRATS BOOED GOD." Below the photo, a quote states, "Crisis doesn't create character; it reveals it," set against a backdrop of a snowy mountain range at sunset.

The image is a meme featuring a man in a plaid shirt labeled “Me” looking away from a smiling woman labeled “T_D,” while another woman holds a sign reading “My essay on why the Republican party is better than the Democratic party.” At the bottom, text reads, “Hope my professor isn’t an NPC.”

The image displays two side-by-side photographs of the Obama family. The left photo shows the family at the beginning of Obama’s presidency, while the right photo shows them years later. Both photos feature Barack and Michelle Obama, their daughters Sasha and Malia, and their dogs, Bo and Sunny, posing outdoors on the White House lawn.

The image displays a meme with a blue border and text at the top and bottom. It features four panels showing an armadillo in various positions, including rolling into a ball. The text reads “THE NEW MASCOT FOR THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY” at the top and “IT ROLLS UP INTO A BALL WITH ITS HEAD UP ITS ASS TO AVOID REALITY” at the bottom.

The image is a split-screen meme featuring Donald Trump on the left with his hair blown upward, and Hillary Clinton on the right with a smug expression. Text overlaid at the bottom reads, “323 MILLION PEOPLE IN THE US ...AND THEY BRING IT DOWN TO THIS.”

The image shows a pumpkin with a digitally superimposed face of Donald Trump, featuring his characteristic hair and facial expression. Text at the top asks, “What do Donald Trump and a Pumpkin have in Common?” and the text at the bottom answers, “They're Orange on the outside, Hollow on the Inside and should be tossed out in early November.”

This is a four-panel meme showing a progression of brain activity visuals alongside text. Each panel lists a different individual or group, starting with Greta Thunberg and ending with Mr. Beast, with the brain imagery intensifying in each subsequent panel. The final panel shows Mr. Beast with a text overlay reading “20,000,000 TREES!” and a background of a forest.

A black-and-white image of a crying baby is overlaid with text. The top text reads, "I voted tactically for the Lib Dems to keep the Tories out." Below the baby, a green banner states, "TACTICAL VOTING HAS GOT US NOWHERE VOTE WITH YOUR HEART," with a logo and "Green Party" at the bottom.

The image shows a chimpanzee and a woman lounging on sunbeds under a yellowish tint. Both are wearing sunglasses, and the woman is in a bikini. Text overlaid on the image reads, "Tina didn't dare mention the bride's bikini line."

The image shows a man in a suit and glasses holding a yellow card, seated in what appears to be an audience or game show setting. Bold white text is overlaid on the image, reading “WELCOME TO THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY” at the top and “WHERE THE FACTS ARE MADE UP AND YOU’RE RACIST OF YOU DISAGREE” at the bottom. Several other people are visible in the background, out of focus.

The image shows Donald Trump speaking at a podium in front of a White House backdrop. A CNN news banner at the bottom reads “BREAKING NEWS: WITHOUT ANY EVIDENCE, TRUMP SAYS HE’S BEING CHEATED.” The screen also displays an electoral map with vote totals.

The image shows a digitally altered scene with a cutout of Donald Trump's face superimposed onto the body of Elsa from Disney’s “Frozen,” set against her ice-themed castle background. Text is overlaid on the image, reading “ELSA...” at the top and “DO YOU WANNA BUILD A WALL?” at the bottom. The image is a meme combining political and pop culture references.

A Shiba Inu dog is sitting upright in a patch of green shrubbery, looking directly at the camera with its mouth open in a happy expression. The dog is surrounded by dense, leafy green foliage, with its front paws visible on the dark ground. Text at the top reads, "I'm with the Green Party," and at the bottom, "Wanna party?"

The image is a meme titled "Famous Joe Biden quotes..." that displays several quotes attributed to Joe Biden, each with a year. It also includes a bottom panel showing Biden and Donald Trump at a debate, with captions reading "You're a racist!" and "Will you shut up, man."

The image shows a political debate scene with Joe Biden speaking while gesturing toward another candidate. Superimposed over the image is a quote attributed to VP Joe Biden, criticizing the origins of the Great Recession. The background appears to be a debate stage with a blue backdrop featuring stars.

The image displays portraits of U.S. President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris side by side against a black background. Above their images is text that reads: "We stood by and did nothing as we watched our colleagues let their Cities burn to the ground." Below their images, additional text states: "But don’t worry we are here to fix things now."

The image is a side-by-side collage featuring rapper T.I. on the left wearing sunglasses and a pink shirt, and U.S. President Joe Biden on the right smiling in a suit. A tweet overlay reads, "I want Joe Biden, need Joe Biden or whatever TI said 😂," attributed to "Rae. @R_Kae · Nov 4."

The image is a collage composed of three photos, each showing a man receiving a medal while being pinned by another individual, with an American flag visible in the background. Large white letters form the words "RAPE" on the left and "TEAM" on the right, vertically aligned along the edges of the image. The photos depict different individuals in formal attire during what appears to be a medal presentation ceremony.

The image features a smiling portrait of Hillary Clinton superimposed over an American flag background, with bold text overlays. The text reads “The ONLY Bridges hillary's built Are EXIT Ramps,” followed by directional labels for different political parties—“Green Party Exit LEFT,” “Libertarian Party Next Exit,” and “Republican Party Exit RIGHT”—implying a metaphor for political pathways. The bottom text states “Any Republican Can NOW Beat her.”

The image features a man in a suit and glasses, seated and looking directly at the viewer. White, bold, capitalized text is overlaid on the image, reading “LIVES IN ONE OF THE MOST FREE SOCIETIES ON THE PLANET” at the top and “COMPLAINS ABOUT NOT HAVING ENOUGH FREEDOM” at the bottom. The background is a plain, dark, slightly textured surface.

A tabby cat with white markings sits perched on a beige cat tree, looking directly at the camera. The image features text overlay that reads: "CATS ARE LIKE THE LIBERTARIAN PARTY SINCE THEY ARE TOTALLY DEPENDENT ON OTHERS, WHILE FIERCELY BELIEVING IN THEIR OWN INDEPENDENCE." A "makeameme.org" watermark is visible in the bottom right corner.

The image shows a black-and-white photo of two hands clasped in a handshake. Below the photo, text reads "GOOD IDEAS DON'T REQUIRE FORCE" and includes the Libertarian Party logo. A caption at the bottom thanks the Libertarian Party of Florida and directs viewers to lp.org/states for local involvement.

The image features a meme with a photo of George W. Bush at the top, alongside his username and ranking points, and a British flag. Below, a black bear with a disapproving expression is overlaid with bold white text that reads, “IF YOU ARE NOT AMERICAN YOU SHOULD STOP TALKING ABOUT AMERICAN POLITICS.”

The image displays a ballot with a handwritten entry "Harambe" marked as "Write-in," next to a photo of a gorilla. Below the ballot and photo, text reads: "Dead Gorilla Harambe Got Over 15,000 Votes To Become President Of The United States." The image is captioned with the word "amazing" at the bottom.

The image is a meme featuring a split-screen from a TV show scene. The top half shows a woman in a pink patterned blouse with the text "TAXATION IS THEFT" superimposed. The bottom half depicts the same woman in the same outfit confronting a man in a white shirt, who is seated and looking down.

The image shows a composite of two men, Barack Obama and George W. Bush, in a circular frame with a dark background. Below the image, there is white text that reads: “Don’t ever let anyone ever get away with telling you that a vote for a third party is wasted. What were the votes for these guys? An investment?”

This is a meme image featuring a shirtless man with a beard raising his arm while standing next to a man in a suit, both in front of a “LIBERTARIAN” sign at the Libertarian Party National Convention in Orlando, Florida. The image has large white text at the top and bottom reading “STILL LESS EMBARRASSING” and “THAN HILLARY CLINTON,” respectively. A “LIVE” indicator and “Road to the White House” branding are visible in the upper right corner.

The image is a three-panel meme featuring Donald Trump pointing at the camera with a “Vote Trump 2016” sign behind him. The subsequent panels show a man smiling and pointing, with text overlaying each panel: “THAT’S A NICE WALL YOU GOT THERE,” “IT WOULD BE A SHAME IF SOMEONE...,” and “...CLIMBED IT.”

The image features a person with dark, curly hair and a serious expression, wearing a dark jacket against a snowy background. Superimposed text in bold, white, capitalized letters reads: “I'M NOT SITH I'M ALT-JEDI YOU CULTURAL REBEL CUCK.” Below the image, additional text states: “No, 'Clovergender' is NOT a Thing! - Libertarian Party of Nevada.”

The image is a tweet from the Libertarian Party of New York featuring a meme. The meme shows two men; one on the left with an exaggerated crying expression holding a sign that reads, “What are you doing?? We’re only supposed to care about money!!” The man on the right has a beard and holds a sign reading, “Systemic racism and LGBTQ+ oppression are the enemies of liberty and I will fight them with my last breath.” The tweet is captioned “All of your rights, all of the time.”

The image is a meme featuring a historical painting of Founding Fathers gathered around a table, with bold white text overlay. The text reads, “FOUNDING FATHERS HERE’S THE FIRST AMENDMENT” and “OH AND IN CASE SOMEONE TRIES TO TAKE THAT AWAY HERE’S THE SECOND AMENDMENT.” At the bottom, there is a credit to the Libertarian Party of Florida with a call to action to visit lp.org/states.

The image features a hand holding a small object against a dark background with blurred lights. Overlaid text reads “LEGALIZE RECREATIONAL COCAINE.” and includes a “LIBERTARIAN” logo in the bottom right corner. The composition uses a shallow depth of field, emphasizing the hand and text while softening the background.

The image features a man with a mustache wearing a light-colored cowboy hat and a vest over a collared shirt. He is looking down and to his right with a somber expression. The image has white text overlaid in two sections: “I'M STARTING TO THINK THIS ENTIRE ADMINISTRATION” at the top and “WAS HOMESCHOoled BY BETSY DEVOS” at the bottom.

A group of people stands on a stage in front of a backdrop with the word "LIBERTARIAN" projected above them. The individuals are holding signs and appear to be at a public event or gathering. A text overlay at the bottom of the image reads: "AND AS A REMINDER NONE OF US ARE ACTUALLY MEMBERS OF THE LIBERTARIAN PARTY AND THAT KEEPS US FROM HAVING TO BE EMBARRASSED BY ASSOCIATION WITH OURSELVES."

A man is seated in a cluttered room, holding a phone to his ear with a look of exasperation. Superimposed text reads, “HAVE YOU TRIED TURNING IT OFF AND ON AGAIN?” The image is a screenshot of a tweet from Marie, related to the 2020 U.S. Presidential Debate.

The image shows two men in suits standing at podiums on a television debate stage, with a digital graphic of lightning bolts visually connecting them. The stage has a blue and red background with “CNN” and “DemDebate” logos, and a lower third banner reads “Political Revolution vs Improving the System” with “DEMOCRATIC PRESIDENTIAL DEBATE.”

This image is a two-panel meme featuring a scene from the movie 'The Office.' In the top panel, a man in a shirt and tie is speaking while a woman looks on, with text overlaying that reads “Me talking about how bad Biden - Harris is” and “Republicans thinking I’m pro Trump.” In the bottom panel, the same man is shown reacting with shock or disbelief, as indicated by the text “F**k,” while the woman stares at him.

The image shows a man in a suit and tie, gesturing with both hands near his chest. Text overlaid at the top reads “DON'T BRING INDEX CARDS” and at the bottom “TO A KNIFE FIGHT NEXT TIME UNCLE JOE.” The background is dark, suggesting a formal setting like a debate or press conference.

The image shows two side-by-side photos of Donald Trump and Joe Biden during a CNN presidential debate, with a caption below attributing the quote "Shut up man. This is so unpresidential. Keep yapping, man." to Joe Biden. The scene includes the debate’s CNN branding and timestamp.

The image shows a smiling woman with short brown hair, glasses, and a red top under a white jacket. She is wearing a red beaded necklace and has a pink name tag pinned to her jacket. The image contains overlaid text at the top and bottom.

The image features a black background with a red, stylized eagle emblem centered above a circular design containing an octopus-like figure. To the left of the emblem is a caricature of a man's face with the text "ORANGE HITLER" beneath it. Below the emblem, the text "THE NEW REPUBLICAN PARTY" is displayed, followed by a caption urging viewers to tell others they found it at "Rude and Rotten Republicans."

The image is a political graphic with a dark blue background. In large white and red letters, it reads "GREED OVER PEOPLE", with "GREED" and "PEOPLE" in red and "OVER" in white. At the top, it asks "WHAT DOES GOP REALLY STAND FOR?", and at the bottom, "CADOF.ORG" and "#GreedOverPeople" are displayed.

The image shows two individuals in white robes and hoods, one with a red hood and the other with a white hood, standing beside a Confederate flag. The text "KKK-ISIS" is prominently displayed at the top, and "SAME TRAILER-DIFFERENT PARK" appears at the bottom. The image includes a watermark in the lower right corner.

The image shows two men seated across from each other at a dining table with wine glasses and plates. The man on the left has blonde hair and is wearing a dark suit with a striped tie, while the man on the right has dark hair and is also wearing a dark suit. The scene appears to be indoors with warm lighting and curtains in the background.

The image shows a man in military attire, including a helmet and uniform, with a cigar in his mouth and a rifle slung over his shoulder. Text overlaid at the top reads "THE REPUBLICAN PARTY" and at the bottom "JUST WENT FULL RETARD." The background is an out-of-focus natural landscape.

The image is a meme featuring a headline about Michael Cohen paying Stormy Daniels $130K to remain silent about a sexual encounter with Donald Trump. It includes three photos: one of Trump and Daniels together, another of Daniels alone, and a third of Trump alone. Below the photos, text reads, "THE BIGGEST SHOCK IS THAT TRUMP ACTUALLY FOLLOWED THROUGH PAYING SOMEONE."

The image features a man in a dark suit and pink tie, gesturing with his right index finger pointed upward. Text overlaid on the image reads, “I DON’T TRUST YOU TO MAKE A CHOICE, BUT YOU’D MAKE A DAMN GOOD PARENT.” In the bottom-left corner, a white mug with a visible logo is partially in view.

The image shows a man with a highly exaggerated, angry facial expression, his eyes wide and mouth open in a scream, with both hands raised near his face. The text at the top reads "Angry Liberal tantrum," and at the bottom, "Why is facebook allowing all these people to disagree with me???." The background is a yellowish patterned texture.

The image displays a photo of a man standing among four women in what appears to be a nightclub or bar, with a neon sign reading "BUNNY BAR" in the background. Overlaid text sarcastically claims the man is at the "Moonlight Bunny Ranch Brothel" and that he "just stopped by for a drink," tagging him as @seanhanity. The photo has a dark, bordered frame and appears to be a digitally altered meme.

A blue church sign for St. Catherine Episcopal Church displays a message on its marquee that reads: “Gov. Perry, God Here. The voice in your head is not me. Take your meds. Choir practice Wed. 7 P.M.” The sign is situated outdoors with a grassy area and trees in the background.

The image shows Donald Trump standing at a podium, pointing forward, with American flags behind him. He is wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and red tie. A text overlay at the bottom reads: "Trump could shoot someone on the Senate floor and still be acquitted 53-47. Unless he shot a republican. Then it would be 52-47."

A person stands in a grassy yard wearing a dark jacket over a brown patterned dress with white knee-high socks and dark shoes. The image has text at the top reading "Just your average Green party voter" and a date stamp "28/02/2010" on the lower left. Houses and trees are visible in the background under an overcast sky.

The image is a three-panel meme using scenes from the "Wannabe" music video by the Spice Girls. Each panel shows a group of people performing a dance move, with text captions that parody political cycles. The top panel says "US politics every 8 years" with the move "Slide to the left," the middle says "US politics every other 8 years" with "Slide to the right," and the bottom says "US politicians re-authorizing endless wars & domestic spying" with "Criss-Cross!"

The image is a two-panel meme featuring actor Snoop Dogg. The left panel shows a person looking confused, labeled "Me commenting on US politics." The right panel shows Snoop Dogg with a skeptical expression, labeled "Me commenting on the politics of my own country." Below both panels is the text: "Wait, Stephen Harper is still the Canadian president, right?"

The image is a two-panel meme. The left panel shows a trash can filled with discarded items like bottles and containers, with text overlay reading "Sinking deeper and deeper into 2020 like" and "The days blending together." The right panel features a scene from Willy Wonka, with characters in a tunnel boat, overlaid with text stating, "I think 2020 is the historical equivalent of the tunnel boat scene in Willy Wonka" and "[SCREAMING]."

The image shows three women in vintage nurse attire, including caps and uniforms, seated at a desk. The woman in the center is shouting with her hand near her mouth, while the other two have surprised expressions. Black text at the top reads "READY FOR THE NEXT DISTRICT!" and at the bottom, "IOWA CAUCUS VOTE COUNT".
The image shows a close-up of Donald Trump with a slight smile. He is wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and tie. The text at the top reads, "When someone says Democrats will win in 2020."

The image displays a split-screen of two men, one on the left eating a sandwich and the other on the right looking forward with a serious expression. A large text overlay reads "THE LOST VERSION OF" above a VHS-style label that says “PLANES, TRAINS & AUTOMOBILES.” The visual style mimics an old VHS tape cover.

The image is a collage of numerous small photos, predominantly featuring people in various settings, likely from social media or news sources. Below the collage, bold text asks, “Is Nevada Done Counting Votes Yet?” and credits the content to Andrew Kiriak. A subtitle notes it's a “SNARK WEEK” feature highlighting memes about Nevada’s slow vote counting pace.

The image is a three-panel meme titled "THINGS THAT GO FASTER THAN NEVADA VOTE COUNTING." The top-left panel shows green grass with the text "WATCHING GRASS GROW." The top-right panel features a snail crawling on pavement labeled "WATCHING SNAILS CRAWL." The bottom panel shows a man sitting on a chair facing a wall with the text "WATCHING PAINT DRY."

A police officer in uniform stands outdoors holding a leash attached to a dog. The dog has a digitally altered face that resembles Joe Biden, with his smiling expression superimposed onto the animal’s head. The officer looks forward while the dog is positioned beside him.

The image is a side-by-side political meme titled "Debate preview:" featuring Donald Trump on the left and Joe Biden on the right. Trump’s section has text reading, "Yes, two Nobel Peace noms. in one week," while Biden’s section says, "OOPS! I MADE POOPY." A watermark "@two_deplorable_ladies" runs vertically between the two images.

The image shows Joe Biden and Barack Obama smiling and interacting in what appears to be a formal setting with American flags and golden drapes in the background. A smartphone is visible in the foreground, capturing the moment. Overlaying the image is a Twitter post with a humorous text exchange between “Joe” and “Barack” about a fictional cheese ban.

The image shows a man in a dark suit and light blue tie looking out from behind a glass-paned door. He has white hair and a serious expression, standing indoors with a plant partially visible in the foreground. The top of the image contains text reading, “when will Obama return home to watch anime with me.”

The image shows two men seated in chairs; one is rubbing his face with both hands while the other sits with his hands clasped. Below the photo is a Twitter post by Brendan Bergen that includes a fictional dialogue between the two men regarding the phrase “drain the swamp.”

The image is a meme featuring a photo of Joe Biden with a series of speech bubbles containing vulgar phrases. The top text reads, "Democrats: Trump is vulgar and not presidential." Below that, it says, "The Democrat frontrunner:" followed by the offensive dialogue bubbles.

This is a three-panel meme using scenes from the movie “The Deer Hunter.” The top panel shows a soldier pleading, “DONT SHOOT! I'M RETARDED.” The middle panel shows soldiers responding with “PROVE IT.” The bottom panel features a person with a “BIDEN” face mask and both hands raised, making the “V” sign with each hand.

The image shows two men seated at a table with nameplates, one leaning over the other. The man leaning forward has a serious expression, while the seated man looks forward with a neutral expression. A nameplate reading "MR. DODO" is visible on the table.

The image is a two-panel meme featuring a person in a suit with the text "I'VE SERVED THIS COUNTRY FOR DECADES." above them. The bottom panel shows a person with an afro hairstyle sitting at a game show podium, with the text "WHAT IS CHINA" displayed below the podium.

A woman with red hair sits on a couch looking distressed, holding her head while speaking to a therapist. The therapist, with blonde hair and a notepad, leans in and responds with a suggestion. Speech bubbles show the patient saying, "I'm finding it impossible to get any alone time lately," and the therapist replies, "Have you tried a Joe Biden rally?"

The image displays a screenshot of a Twitter post from the account @BlackLivesMatter, which includes a message addressed to “dumb ass white people” and a hashtag “#Stopbeingsowhite,” along with a ninja emoji. Below the tweet, a popular meme image shows a man with his hands on his head, conveying disbelief or frustration. The tweet has garnered 519 retweets and 4K likes.

The image shows a man seated in a dark, ornate chair, looking tired or disinterested. Text at the top reads “HUNTER BIDEN,” and text at the bottom reads “WATCHING THE DEBATE.” A bottle and some white powder are visible on the table in front of him.

The image shows a game show-style scoreboard with the prompt “NAME SOMETHING THAT TRIGGERS THE LEFT” at the top. The scoreboard displays eight categories with numerical values, including “TRUMP” at 35, “CONSTITUTION” at 8, “PATRIOTISM” at 20, “TAX CUTS” at 15, “FREE SPEECH” at 8, “PERSONAL RESPONSIBILITY” at 6, “JUSTICE BRETT KAVANAUGH” at 4, and “RED HATS” at 4. A man in a suit is visible in the top-left corner holding a tablet.

The image is a meme featuring Donald Trump and Nancy Pelosi with speech bubbles. Trump asks Pelosi, “Did you fall from heaven?” and she responds, “No, why?” Trump then replies, “Because you remind me of Lucifer.” The image includes the watermark “ifunny.co” in the bottom right corner.

The image is a meme featuring a dramatic, historical painting of soldiers in battle. Large white text overlays the top and bottom of the image, reading “I BETTER LISTEN TO THE GOVERNMENT AND TURN IN MY GUNS” and “SAID NO AMERICAN EVER.” A black rectangular tag with the username “@mr_young_republican” is centered in the middle.

The image shows a young man wearing a red baseball cap with a slight smirk, seated among others in a crowd. Above him is bold text asking, “CAN WE ALL SHOW SOME RESPECT FOR THE HIGHEST PAID PERSON AT CNN & WAPO?” The background shows other people, some also wearing red caps.

The image shows a man in a suit and tie seated in a car, holding a handgun pointed outward through the open window. Bold white text at the top reads “GET IN, PUSSY” and at the bottom reads “WE’RE MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!” The man is looking directly at the viewer with a slight smirk.

The image is a split-screen meme featuring Donald Trump on the left with his mouth open and a stern expression, and the character Annoying Orange on the right with a wide, toothy grin. Both faces are shown with bold text at the bottom that reads "LOOK FAMILIAR?".

The image shows a close-up of a man's face with duct tape across his mouth. Text at the top reads "HOW TO MAKE" and text at the bottom reads "AMERICA GREAT AGAIN." The man has light-colored hair and is looking slightly to the side.

The image features a close-up portrait of Barack Obama smiling in front of an American flag. Above the photo, bold text declares “BREAKING NEWS: new third party candidate Oarack Bobama enters the race for the presidency.” The name “Oarack Bobama” is a distorted version of “Barack Obama.”

The image shows a close-up of Donald Trump making a puckered lips expression. The words "ORANGE IS THE NEW BLACK" are superimposed in bold white text across the top and bottom of the image. He is wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and pink tie, with a blurred background.

The image shows two men, identified as Joe Biden and Barack Obama, seated and interacting in a formal indoor setting. Biden is leaning toward Obama, who is smiling and appears to be speaking or reacting. The image includes overlaid text presenting a humorous fictional dialogue between them.

The image shows former President Barack Obama walking in a room, wearing a bright green suit with a matching patterned tie. Text at the top reads "OBAMA'S LEGACY" and at the bottom, "OF HORRIBLE DECISIONS CONTINUES...". An American flag is partially visible on the right side.

The image shows two side-by-side pictures of foxes. The left image features a well-groomed, alert-looking fox labeled "Libertarian Ideas." The right image shows a shaggy, unkempt-looking fox labeled "Libertarian Candidates."

The image shows former U.S. President Barack Obama standing at a podium in front of a backdrop featuring the White House emblem. He is wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and tie, and appears to be speaking. A text overlay at the bottom reads: "BASICALLY I'M HERE TO ANNOUNCE THAT WE'RE BUILDING IRON MAN."
